text:
On 12/08/2010 20:55, Aldis Berjoza wrote:
> On 12/08/2010 18:08, pav@FreeBSD.org wrote:
>> I don't like this approach. Instead, if there's a general agreement that
>> freeglut is always prefered to libglut, I'd like to see a migration of existing
>> ports to freeglut without changing the semantics of OPEN_GL macro.
> 
> How can we arrange that?
> There are currently 122 ports that use libglut.
> 
> Should I mail all of them? :)
> 
 dam that web interface
